verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every now and then and for eternity God bless the day when He gave me you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every now and then and for a lifetime I bless this day and cherish your faith in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm gonna pray with you, walk with you, stay with you until the end I'm gonna laugh with you, cry with you, breathe with you all my days The road may be rough, vague and dark, bleak and tough I promise to cherish you with all my heart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In all my dreams, my earnest hope I wish you well every minute, every day

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In all my dreams, my dearest friend May the Lord protect you in every way
